title: Brevo vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool fits your needs.
h1: Brevo vs Campaign Monitor: Complete Feature & Pricing Comparison
intro: Brevo and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Brevo offers a freemium all-in-one CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities, while Campaign Monitor specializes in beautiful email design and multi-brand management. This comparison helps you choose the right tool based on your budget, team size, and marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, CRM

choose_a_if: You want a free email marketing plan with high contact limits
You need multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat) in one platform
You require CRM and transactional email API capabilities
You're a startup or small business with a tight budget
choose_b_if: You manage multiple brands and need white-label capabilities
You prioritize email design and template quality
You need advanced journey designer and smart segmentation
You work in an agency setting with team collaboration needs

faq.q: Is Brevo better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Brevo excels for budget-conscious businesses seeking multi-channel marketing with a free tier, while Campaign Monitor is better for agencies managing multiple client brands. Brevo has higher user ratings (4.5 vs 4.1 on G2) and stronger overall value.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper with a free plan supporting up to 100,000 contacts and paid plans starting at $25/month. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month, making it more expensive for most users since you'll need higher-tier plans for robust features.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports, making migration straightforward. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your contacts and import them into Brevo, though you may need to recreate campaigns and automations manually.
